creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Sorry for the late reply.  I have checked your solution, it is fine,
however I would like to propose some further enhancements:

- It seems I was wrong, PORTDOCS support for xmobar could be even
omitted as there is not too much documentation :)  However, I found a
simple README file... well, that would count as documentation.

- I think you are misusing RMLIC: it is for tricky license files, where
license is stored in the PORTDOCS directory, but should be present even
when NOPORTDOCS is defined.  (You can see many examples for this in the
other Haskell ports.)

- In my opinion, xmobar.config-sample should be in the PORTEXAMPLES
directory since it is example file for configuring xmobar.


Here I send a modified patch.  Well, what are your opinions?

Cheers,
:g
